ocr_findings.description: Pyramid diagram is rendered as structured text description rather than visual reproduction; diagram labels (経営理念, ビジョン, 企業戦略, 事業戦略, 機能別戦略, 情報システム戦略, 情報システム部門・生産部門・販売部門, 事業A/B/C) are all captured in the text description accurately.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 05-01 情報システム戦略 page (cleaned OCR used). The strategic pyramid diagram content is faithfully described in text. All three numbered consideration points (あるべき姿/最適化/経営戦略基づき) and body paragraphs are present and accurate. Clean OCR performed well on this structured content page.
